verses.kjv: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites these cities with their suburbs.
verses.bsb: So the Israelites gave to the Levites these cities and their pasturelands.

verses.esv: They gave by lot out of the tribes of Judah, Simeon, and Benjamin these cities that are mentioned by name.
verses.kjv: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities, which are called by their names.
verses.bsb: They assigned by lot the cities named above from the tribes of Judah, Simeon, and Benjamin.

verses.esv: And some of the clans of the sons of Kohath had cities of their territory out of the tribe of Ephraim.
verses.kjv: And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.
verses.bsb: And some of the clans of the Kohathites were given cities from the tribe of Ephraim for their territory:

verses.esv: They were given the cities of refuge: Shechem with its pasturelands in the hill country of Ephraim, Gezer with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: And they gave unto them, of the cities of refuge, Shechem in mount Ephraim with her suburbs; they gave also Gezer with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: They were given Shechem (a city of refuge) with its pasturelands in the hill country of Ephraim, and Gezer,

verses.esv: Jokmeam with its pasturelands, Beth-horon with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: And Jokmeam with her suburbs, and Beth-horon with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: Jokmeam, Beth-horon,

verses.esv: Aijalon with its pasturelands, Gath-rimmon with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gath-rimmon with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Aijalon, and Gath-rimmon, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: and out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Aner with its pasturelands, and Bileam with its pasturelands, for the rest of the clans of the Kohathites.
verses.kjv: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sons of Kohath.
verses.bsb: And from the half-tribe of Manasseh the remaining clans of the Kohathites were given Aner and Bileam, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: To the Gershomites were given out of the clan of the half-tribe of Manasseh: Golan in Bashan with its pasturelands and Ashtaroth with its pasturelands;
verses.kjv: Unto the sons of Gershom were given out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, and Ashtaroth with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: The Gershomites received the following:  From the clan of the half-tribe of Manasseh they were given Golan in Bashan and also Ashtaroth, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: and out of the tribe of Issachar: Kedesh with its pasturelands, Daberath with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Issachar; Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: From the tribe of Issachar they were given Kedesh, Daberath,

verses.esv: Ramoth with its pasturelands, and Anem with its pasturelands;
verses.kjv: And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Ramoth, and Anem, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: out of the tribe of Asher: Mashal with its pasturelands, Abdon with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Asher; Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: From the tribe of Asher they were given Mashal, Abdon,

verses.esv: Hukok with its pasturelands, and Rehob with its pasturelands;
verses.kjv: And Hukok with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Hukok, and Rehob, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: and out of the tribe of Naphtali: Kedesh in Galilee with its pasturelands, Hammon with its pasturelands, and Kiriathaim with its pasturelands.
verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Naphtali; Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kirjathaim with her suburbs.
verses.bsb: And from the tribe of Naphtali they were given Kedesh in Galilee, Hammon, and Kiriathaim, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: To the rest of the Merarites were allotted out of the tribe of Zebulun: Rimmono with its pasturelands, Tabor with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: Unto the rest of the children of Merari were given out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmon with her suburbs, Tabor with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: The Merarites (the rest of the Levites) received the following:  From the tribe of Zebulun they were given Rimmono and Tabor, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: and beyond the Jordan at Jericho, on the east side of the Jordan, out of the tribe of Reuben: Bezer in the wilderness with its pasturelands, Jahzah with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: And on the other side Jordan by Jericho, on the east side of Jordan, were given them out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with her suburbs, and Jahzah with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: From the tribe of Reuben east of the Jordan opposite Jericho they were given Bezer in the wilderness, Jahzah,

verses.esv: Kedemoth with its pasturelands, and Mephaath with its pasturelands;
verses.kjv: Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Kedemoth, and Mephaath, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: and out of the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead with its pasturelands, Mahanaim with its pasturelands,
verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Gad; Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, and Mahanaim with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: And from the tribe of Gad they were given Ramoth in Gilead, Mahanaim,

verses.esv: Heshbon with its pasturelands, and Jazer with its pasturelands.
verses.kjv: And Heshbon with her suburbs, and Jazer with her suburbs.
verses.bsb: Heshbon, and Jazer, together with their pasturelands.

verses.esv: The sons of Issachar: Tola, Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.
verses.kjv: NOW the sons of Issachar were, Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.
verses.bsb: The sons of Issachar:  Tola, Puah, Jashub, and Shimron—four in all.

verses.esv: The sons of Tola: Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their fathers' houses, namely of Tola, mighty warriors of their generations, their number in the days of David being 22,600.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Tola; Uzzi, and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Jibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their father’s house, to wit, of Tola: they were valiant men of might in their generations; whose number was in the days of David two and twenty thousand and six hundred.
verses.bsb: The sons of Tola:   Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, and Shemuel, the heads of their families. In the days of David, 22,600 descendants of Tola were numbered in their genealogies as mighty men of valor.

verses.esv: The son of Uzzi: Izrahiah. And the sons of Izrahiah: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, and Isshiah, all five of them were chief men.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Uzzi; Izrahiah: and the sons of Izrahiah; Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Ishiah, five: all of them chief men.
verses.bsb: The son of Uzzi:   Izrahiah.   The sons of Izrahiah:

verses.esv: And along with them, by their generations, according to their fathers' houses, were units of the army for war, 36,000, for they had many wives and sons.
verses.kjv: And with them, by their generations, after the house of their fathers, were bands of soldiers for war, six and thirty thousand men: for they had many wives and sons.
verses.bsb: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, and Isshiah. All five of them were chiefs. In addition to them, according to their genealogy, they had 36,000 troops for battle, for they had many wives and children.

verses.esv: Their kinsmen belonging to all the clans of Issachar were in all 87,000 mighty warriors, enrolled by genealogy.
verses.kjv: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar were valiant men of might, reckoned in all by their genealogies fourscore and seven thousand.
verses.bsb: Their kinsmen belonging to all the families of Issachar who were mighty men of valor totaled 87,000, as listed in their genealogies.

verses.esv: The sons of Benjamin: Bela, Becher, and Jediael, three.
verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Benjamin; Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.
verses.bsb: The three sons of Benjamin:  Bela, Becher, and Jediael.

verses.esv: The sons of Bela: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, and Iri, five, heads of fathers' houses, mighty warriors. And their enrollment by genealogies was 22,034.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Bela; Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour; and were reckoned by their genealogies twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.
verses.bsb: The sons of Bela:   Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, and Iri, heads of their families—five in all. There were 22,034 mighty men of valor listed in their genealogies.

verses.esv: The sons of Becher: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these were the sons of Becher.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Becher; Zemira, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jerimoth, and Abiah, and Anathoth, and Alameth. All these are the sons of Becher.
verses.bsb: The sons of Becher:

verses.esv: And their enrollment by genealogies, according to their generations, as heads of their fathers' houses, mighty warriors, was 20,200.
verses.kjv: And the number of them, after their genealogy by their generations, heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour, was twenty thousand and two hundred.
verses.bsb: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth, and Alemeth; all these were Becher’s sons. Their genealogies were recorded according to the heads of their families—20,200 mighty men of valor.

verses.esv: The son of Jediael: Bilhan. And the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, and Ahishahar.
verses.kjv: The sons also of Jediael; Bilhan: and the sons of Bilhan; Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tharshish, and Ahishahar.
verses.bsb: The son of Jediael:   Bilhan.   The sons of Bilhan:

verses.esv: All these were the sons of Jediael according to the heads of their fathers' houses, mighty warriors, 17,200, able to go to war.
verses.kjv: All these the sons of Jediael, by the heads of their fathers, mighty men of valour, were seventeen thousand and two hundred soldiers, fit to go out for war and battle.
verses.bsb: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, and Ahishahar. All these sons of Jediael were heads of their families, mighty men of valor; there were 17,200 fit for battle.

verses.esv: And Shuppim and Huppim were the sons of Ir, Hushim the son of Aher.
verses.kjv: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the children of Ir, and Hushim, the sons of Aher.
verses.bsb: The Shuppites and Huppites were descendants of Ir, and the Hushites were descendants of Aher.

verses.esv: The sons of Naphtali: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer and Shallum, the descendants of Bilhah.
verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Naphtali; Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Naphtali:  Jahziel, Guni, Jezer, and Shallum—the descendants of Bilhah.

verses.esv: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his Aramean concubine bore; she bore Machir the father of Gilead.
verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Manasseh; Ashriel, whom she bare: (but his concubine the Aramitess bare Machir the father of Gilead:
verses.bsb: The descendants of Manasseh:  Through his Aramean concubine, Asriel, as well as Machir the father of Gilead.

verses.esv: And Machir took a wife for Huppim and for Shuppim. The name of his sister was Maacah. And the name of the second was Zelophehad, and Zelophehad had daughters.
verses.kjv: And Machir took to wife the sister of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maachah;) and the name of the second was Zelophehad: and Zelophehad had daughters.
verses.bsb: Machir took a wife from among the Huppites and Shuppites. The name of his sister was Maacah.   Another descendant was named Zelophehad, who had only daughters.

verses.esv: And Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.
verses.kjv: And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.
verses.bsb: Machir’s wife Maacah gave birth to a son, and she named him Peresh. His brother was named Sheresh, and his sons were Ulam and Rekem.

verses.esv: The son of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, son of Manasseh.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Ulam; Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.
verses.bsb: The son of Ulam:   Bedan.

verses.esv: And his sister Hammolecheth bore Ishhod, Abiezer, and Mahlah.
verses.kjv: And his sister Hammoleketh bare Ishod, and Abiezer, and Mahalah.
verses.bsb: These were the sons of Gilead son of Machir, the son of Manasseh. His sister Hammolecheth gave birth to Ishhod, Abiezer, and Mahlah.

verses.esv: The sons of Shemida were Ahian, Shechem, Likhi, and Aniam.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Shemida were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
verses.bsb: And these were the sons of Shemida:   Ahian, Shechem, Likhi, and Aniam.

verses.esv: The sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah, and Bered his son, Tahath his son, Eleadah his son, Tahath his son,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the sons of Ephraim; Shuthelah, and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eladah his son, and Tahath his son,
verses.bsb: The descendants of Ephraim:

verses.esv: Zabad his son, Shuthelah his son, and Ezer and Elead, whom the men of Gath who were born in the land killed, because they came down to raid their livestock.
verses.kjv: ¶ And Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in that land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.
verses.bsb: Shuthelah, Bered his son, Tahath his son, Eleadah his son, Tahath his son, Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son.   Ezer and Elead were killed by the natives of Gath, because they went down to steal their livestock.

verses.esv: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brothers came to comfort him.
verses.kjv: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.
verses.bsb: Their father Ephraim mourned for many days, and his relatives came to comfort him.

verses.esv: And Ephraim went in to his wife, and she conceived and bore a son. And he called his name Beriah, because disaster had befallen his house.
verses.kjv: ¶ And when he went in to his wife, she conceived, and bare a son, and he called his name Beriah, because it went evil with his house.
verses.bsb: And again he slept with his wife, and she conceived and gave birth to a son. So he named him Beriah, because tragedy had come upon his house.

verses.esv: His daughter was Sheerah, who built both Lower and Upper Beth-horon, and Uzzen-sheerah.
verses.kjv: (And his daughter was Sherah, who built Beth-horon the nether, and the upper, and Uzzen-sherah.)
verses.bsb: His daughter was Sheerah, who built Lower and Upper Beth-horon, as well as Uzzen-sheerah.

verses.esv: Rephah was his son, Resheph his son, Telah his son, Tahan his son,
verses.kjv: And Rephah was his son, also Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,
verses.bsb: Additionally, Rephah was his son, Resheph his son, Telah his son, Tahan his son,

verses.esv: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,
verses.kjv: Laadan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,
verses.bsb: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,

verses.esv: Nun his son, Joshua his son.
verses.kjv: Non his son, Jehoshua his son.
verses.bsb: Nun his son, and Joshua his son.

verses.esv: Their possessions and settlements were Bethel and its towns, and to the east Naaran, and to the west Gezer and its towns, Shechem and its towns, and Ayyah and its towns;
verses.kjv: ¶ And their possessions and habitations were, Beth-el and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Gaza and the towns thereof:
verses.bsb: Their holdings and settlements included Bethel and its villages, Naaran to the east, Gezer and its villages to the west, and Shechem and its villages as far as Ayyah and its villages.

verses.esv: also in possession of the Manassites, Beth-shean and its towns, Taanach and its towns, Megiddo and its towns, Dor and its towns. In these lived the sons of Joseph the son of Israel.
verses.kjv: And by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth-shean and her towns, Taanach and her towns, Megiddo and her towns, Dor and her towns. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.
verses.bsb: And along the borders of Manasseh were Beth-shean, Taanach, Megiddo, and Dor, together with their villages. The descendants of Joseph son of Israel lived in these towns.

verses.esv: The sons of Asher: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, and their sister Serah.
verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Asher; Imnah, and Isuah, and Ishuai, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.
verses.bsb: The children of Asher:  Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, and their sister Serah.

verses.esv: The sons of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel, who fathered Birzaith.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel, who is the father of Birzavith.
verses.bsb: The sons of Beriah:   Heber, as well as Malchiel, who was the father of Birzaith.

verses.esv: Heber fathered Japhlet, Shomer, Hotham, and their sister Shua.
verses.kjv: And Heber begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.
verses.bsb: Heber was the father of Japhlet, Shomer, and Hotham, and of their sister Shua.

verses.esv: The sons of Japhlet: Pasach, Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the sons of Japhlet.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Japhlet; Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the children of Japhlet.
verses.bsb: The sons of Japhlet:   Pasach, Bimhal, and Ashvath. These were Japhlet’s sons.

verses.esv: The sons of Shemer his brother: Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.
verses.bsb: The sons of Shemer:   Ahi, Rohgah, Hubbah, and Aram.

verses.esv: The sons of Helem his brother: Zophah, Imna, Shelesh, and Amal.
verses.kjv: And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.
verses.bsb: The sons of his brother Helem:   Zophah, Imna, Shelesh, and Amal.

verses.esv: The sons of Zophah: Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, Imrah.
verses.kjv: The sons of Zophah; Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah,
verses.bsb: The sons of Zophah:

verses.esv: Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, and Beera.
verses.kjv: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.
verses.bsb: Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, Imrah, Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, and Beera.

verses.esv: The sons of Jether: Jephunneh, Pispa, and Ara.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.
verses.bsb: The sons of Jether:   Jephunneh, Pispa, and Ara.

verses.esv: The sons of Ulla: Arah, Hanniel, and Rizia.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Ulla; Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.
verses.bsb: The sons of Ulla:   Arah, Hanniel, and Rizia.

verses.esv: All of these were men of Asher, heads of fathers' houses, approved, mighty warriors, chiefs of the princes. Their number enrolled by genealogies, for service in war, was 26,000 men.
verses.kjv: All these were the children of Asher, heads of their father’s house, choice and mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number throughout the genealogy of them that were apt to the war and to battle was twenty and six thousand men.
verses.bsb: All these were the descendants of Asher—heads of their families, choice and mighty men of valor, and chiefs among the leaders. The number of men fit for battle, recorded in their genealogies, was 26,000.

verses.esv: Benjamin fathered Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, Aharah the third,
verses.kjv: NOW Benjamin begat Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,
verses.bsb: Benjamin was the father of Bela, his firstborn; Ashbel was the second born, Aharah the third,

verses.esv: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
verses.kjv: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
verses.bsb: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

verses.esv: And Bela had sons: Addar, Gera, Abihud,
verses.kjv: And the sons of Bela were, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,
verses.bsb: The sons of Bela:

verses.esv: Abishua, Naaman, Ahoah,
verses.kjv: And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,
verses.bsb: Addar, Gera, Abihud, Abishua, Naaman, Ahoah,

verses.esv: Gera, Shephuphan, and Huram.
verses.kjv: And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
verses.bsb: Gera, Shephuphan, and Huram.

verses.esv: These are the sons of Ehud (they were heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Geba, and they were carried into exile to Manahath):
verses.kjv: And these are the sons of Ehud: these are the heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Geba, and they removed them to Manahath:
verses.bsb: These were the descendants of Ehud who were the heads of the families living in Geba and were exiled to Manahath:

verses.esv: Naaman, Ahijah, and Gera, that is, Heglam, who fathered Uzza and Ahihud.
verses.kjv: And Naaman, and Ahiah, and Gera, he removed them, and begat Uzza, and Ahihud.
verses.bsb: Naaman, Ahijah, and Gera, who carried them into exile and who was the father of Uzza and Ahihud.

verses.esv: And Shaharaim fathered sons in the country of Moab after he had sent away Hushim and Baara his wives.
verses.kjv: And Shaharaim begat children in the country of Moab, after he had sent them away; Hushim and Baara were his wives.
verses.bsb: Shaharaim had sons in the country of Moab after he had divorced his wives Hushim and Baara.

verses.esv: He fathered sons by Hodesh his wife: Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcam,
verses.kjv: And he begat of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,
verses.bsb: His sons by his wife Hodesh:

verses.esv: Jeuz, Sachia, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of fathers' houses.
verses.kjv: And Jeuz, and Shachia, and Mirma. These were his sons, heads of the fathers.
verses.bsb: Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcam, Jeuz, Sachia, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of families.

verses.esv: He also fathered sons by Hushim: Abitub and Elpaal.
verses.kjv: And of Hushim he begat Abitub, and Elpaal.
verses.bsb: He also had sons by Hushim:   Abitub and Elpaal.

verses.esv: The sons of Elpaal: Eber, Misham, and Shemed, who built Ono and Lod with its towns,
verses.kjv: The sons of Elpaal; Eber, and Misham, and Shamed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof:
verses.bsb: The sons of Elpaal:

verses.esv: and Beriah and Shema (they were heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who caused the inhabitants of Gath to flee);
verses.kjv: Beriah also, and Shema, who were heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who drove away the inhabitants of Gath:
verses.bsb: Eber, Misham, Shemed (who built Ono and Lod with its villages), and Beriah and Shema (who were the heads of families of the inhabitants of Aijalon and who drove out the inhabitants of Gath).

verses.esv: and Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth.
verses.kjv: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,
verses.bsb: Ahio, Shashak, Jeremoth,

verses.esv: Zebadiah, Arad, Eder,
verses.kjv: And Zebadiah, and Arad, and Ader,
verses.bsb: Zebadiah, Arad, Eder,

verses.esv: Michael, Ishpah, and Joha were sons of Beriah.
verses.kjv: And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;
verses.bsb: Michael, Ishpah, and Joha were the sons of Beriah.

verses.esv: Zebadiah, Meshullam, Hizki, Heber,
verses.kjv: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,
verses.bsb: Zebadiah, Meshullam, Hizki, Heber,

verses.esv: Ishmerai, Izliah, and Jobab were the sons of Elpaal.
verses.kjv: Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;
verses.bsb: Ishmerai, Izliah, and Jobab were the sons of Elpaal.

verses.esv: Jakim, Zichri, Zabdi,
verses.kjv: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,
verses.bsb: Jakim, Zichri, Zabdi,

verses.esv: Elienai, Zillethai, Eliel,
verses.kjv: And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,
verses.bsb: Elienai, Zillethai, Eliel,

verses.esv: Adaiah, Beraiah, and Shimrath were the sons of Shimei.
verses.kjv: And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;
verses.bsb: Adaiah, Beraiah, and Shimrath were the sons of Shimei.

verses.esv: Ishpan, Eber, Eliel,
verses.kjv: And Ishpan, and Heber, and Eliel,
verses.bsb: Ishpan, Eber, Eliel,

verses.esv: Abdon, Zichri, Hanan,
verses.kjv: And Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,
verses.bsb: Abdon, Zichri, Hanan,

verses.esv: Hananiah, Elam, Anthothijah,
verses.kjv: And Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothijah,
verses.bsb: Hananiah, Elam, Anthothijah,

verses.esv: Iphdeiah, and Penuel were the sons of Shashak.
verses.kjv: And Iphedeiah, and Penuel, the sons of Shashak;
verses.bsb: Iphdeiah, and Penuel were the sons of Shashak.

verses.esv: Shamsherai, Shehariah, Athaliah,
verses.kjv: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,
verses.bsb: Shamsherai, Shehariah, Athaliah,

verses.esv: Jaareshiah, Elijah, and Zichri were the sons of Jeroham.
verses.kjv: And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
verses.bsb: Jaareshiah, Elijah, and Zichri were the sons of Jeroham.

verses.esv: These were the heads of fathers' houses, according to their generations, chief men. These lived in Jerusalem.
verses.kjv: These were heads of the fathers, by their generations, chief men. These dwelt in Jerusalem.
verses.bsb: All these were heads of families, the chiefs according to their genealogies, and they lived in Jerusalem.

verses.esv: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon, and the name of his wife was Maacah.
verses.kjv: And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; whose wife’s name was Maachah:
verses.bsb: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon. His wife’s name was Maacah,

verses.esv: His firstborn son: Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab,
verses.kjv: And his firstborn son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,
verses.bsb: and Abdon was his firstborn son, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab,

verses.esv: Gedor, Ahio, Zecher,
verses.kjv: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zacher.
verses.bsb: Gedor, Ahio, Zecher,

verses.esv: and Mikloth (he fathered Shimeah). Now these also lived opposite their kinsmen in Jerusalem, with their kinsmen.
verses.kjv: And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.
verses.bsb: and Mikloth, who was the father of Shimeah. These also lived alongside their relatives in Jerusalem.

verses.esv: Ner was the father of Kish, Kish of Saul, Saul of Jonathan, Malchi-shua, Abinadab and Eshbaal;
verses.kjv: ¶ And Ner begat Kish, and Kish begat Saul, and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.
verses.bsb: Ner was the father of Kish, Kish was the father of Saul, and Saul was the father of Jonathan, Malchishua, Abinadab, and Esh-baal.

verses.esv: and the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal was the father of Micah.
verses.kjv: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begat Micah.
verses.bsb: The son of Jonathan:   Merib-baal, and Merib-baal was the father of Micah.

verses.esv: The sons of Micah: Pithon, Melech, Tarea, and Ahaz.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.
verses.bsb: The sons of Micah:   Pithon, Melech, Tarea, and Ahaz.

verses.esv: Ahaz fathered Jehoaddah, and Jehoaddah fathered Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri. Zimri fathered Moza.
verses.kjv: And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,
verses.bsb: Ahaz was the father of Jehoaddah, Jehoaddah was the father of Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri, and Zimri was the father of Moza.

verses.esv: Moza fathered Binea; Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
verses.kjv: And Moza begat Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:
verses.bsb: Moza was the father of Binea. Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, and Azel his son.

verses.esv: Azel had six sons, and these are their names: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.
verses.kjv: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.
verses.bsb: Azel had six sons, and these were their names:   Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.

verses.esv: The sons of Eshek his brother: Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
verses.bsb: The sons of his brother Eshek:

verses.esv: The sons of Ulam were men who were mighty warriors, bowmen, having many sons and grandsons, 150. All these were Benjaminites.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sons, and sons’ sons, an hundred and fifty. All these are of the sons of Benjamin.
verses.bsb: Ulam was his firstborn, Jeush second, and Eliphelet third. The sons of Ulam were mighty men of valor, archers, and they had many sons and grandsons—150 in all.   All these were the descendants of Benjamin.

verses.esv: So all Israel was recorded in genealogies, and these are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel. And Judah was taken into exile in Babylon because of their breach of faith.
verses.kjv: SO all Israel were reckoned by genealogies; and, behold, they were written in the book of the kings of Israel and Judah, who were carried away to Babylon for their transgression.
verses.bsb: So all Israel was recorded in the genealogies written in the Book of the Kings of Israel. But Judah was exiled to Babylon because of their unfaithfulness.

verses.esv: Now the first to dwell again in their possessions in their cities were Israel, the priests, the Levites, and the temple servants.
verses.kjv: ¶ Now the first inhabitants that dwelt in their possessions in their cities were, the Israelites, the priests, Levites, and the Nethinims.
verses.bsb: Now the first to resettle their own property in their cities were Israelites, priests, Levites, and temple servants.

verses.esv: And some of the people of Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh lived in Jerusalem:
verses.kjv: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim, and Manasseh;
verses.bsb: These were some of the descendants of Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh who lived in Jerusalem:

verses.esv: Uthai the son of Ammihud, son of Omri, son of Imri, son of Bani, from the sons of Perez the son of Judah.
verses.kjv: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Pharez the son of Judah.
verses.bsb: Uthai son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, a descendant of Perez son of Judah.

verses.esv: And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.
verses.kjv: And of the Shilonites; Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.
verses.bsb: From the Shilonites:   Asaiah the firstborn and his sons.

verses.esv: Of the sons of Zerah: Jeuel and their kinsmen, 690.
verses.kjv: And of the sons of Zerah; Jeuel, and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.
verses.bsb: From the Zerahites:   Jeuel and 690 relatives.

verses.esv: Of the Benjaminites: Sallu the son of Meshullam, son of Hodaviah, son of Hassenuah,
verses.kjv: And of the sons of Benjamin; Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hasenuah,
verses.bsb: From the Benjamites:   Sallu son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hassenuah;

verses.esv: Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, Elah the son of Uzzi, son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephatiah, son of Reuel, son of Ibnijah;
verses.kjv: And Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephathiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibnijah;
verses.bsb: Ibneiah son of Jeroham;   Elah son of Uzzi, the son of Michri;   Meshullam son of Shephatiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibnijah;

verses.esv: and their kinsmen according to their generations, 956. All these were heads of fathers' houses according to their fathers' houses.
verses.kjv: And their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men were chief of the fathers in the house of their fathers.
verses.bsb: and 956 of their relatives according to their genealogy. All these men were heads of their families.

verses.esv: Of the priests: Jedaiah, Jehoiarib, Jachin,
verses.kjv: ¶ And of the priests; Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,
verses.bsb: From the priests:   Jedaiah, Jehoiarib, and Jachin;

verses.esv: and Azariah the son of Hilkiah, son of Meshullam, son of Zadok, son of Meraioth, son of Ahitub, the chief officer of the house of God;
verses.kjv: And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;
verses.bsb: Azariah son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the chief official of God’s temple;

verses.esv: and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, son of Pashhur, son of Malchijah, and Maasai the son of Adiel, son of Jahzerah, son of Meshullam, son of Meshillemith, son of Immer;
verses.kjv: And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;
verses.bsb: Adaiah son of Jeroham, the son of Pashhur, the son of Malchijah;   Maasai son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;

verses.esv: besides their kinsmen, heads of their fathers' houses, 1,760, mighty men for the work of the service of the house of God.
verses.kjv: And their brethren, heads of the house of their fathers, a thousand and seven hundred and threescore; very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.
verses.bsb: and 1,760 of their relatives, the heads of their families, able men for the work of the service of the house of God.

verses.esv: Of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, son of Azrikam, son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;
verses.kjv: And of the Levites; Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;
verses.bsb: From the Levites:   Shemaiah son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, a descendant of Merari;

verses.esv: and Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal and Mattaniah the son of Mica, son of Zichri, son of Asaph;
verses.kjv: And Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Micah, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;
verses.bsb: Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal, and Mattaniah son of Mica, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;

verses.esv: and Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, son of Galal, son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, son of Elkanah, who lived in the villages of the Netophathites.
verses.kjv: And Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.
verses.bsb: Obadiah son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun;   and Berechiah son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, who lived in the villages of the Netophathites.

verses.esv: The gatekeepers were Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, Ahiman, and their kinsmen (Shallum was the chief);
verses.kjv: And the porters were, Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brethren: Shallum was the chief;
verses.bsb: These were the gatekeepers:   Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, Ahiman, and their relatives.

verses.esv: until then they were in the king's gate on the east side as the gatekeepers of the camps of the Levites.
verses.kjv: Who hitherto waited in the king’s gate eastward: they were porters in the companies of the children of Levi.
verses.bsb: Shallum was their chief; he was previously stationed at the King’s Gate on the east side. These were the gatekeepers from the camp of the Levites.

verses.esv: Shallum the son of Kore, son of Ebiasaph, son of Korah, and his kinsmen of his fathers' house, the Korahites, were in charge of the work of the service, keepers of the thresholds of the tent, as their fathers had been in charge of the camp of the LORD, keepers of the entrance.
verses.kjv: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of the house of his father, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the tabernacle: and their fathers, being over the host of the Lord, were keepers of the entry.
verses.bsb: Shallum son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his relatives from the Korahites were assigned to guard the thresholds of the Tent, just as their fathers had been assigned to guard the entrance to the dwelling of the LORD.

verses.esv: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the chief officer over them in time past; the LORD was with him.
verses.kjv: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the ruler over them in time past, and the Lord was with him.
verses.bsb: In earlier times Phinehas son of Eleazar had been in charge of the gatekeepers, and the LORD was with him.

verses.esv: Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was gatekeeper at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
verses.kjv: And Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was porter of the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: Zechariah son of Meshelemiah was the gatekeeper at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: All these, who were chosen as gatekeepers at the thresholds, were 212. They were enrolled by genealogies in their villages. David and Samuel the seer established them in their office of trust.
verses.kjv: All these which were chosen to be porters in the gates were two hundred and twelve. These were reckoned by their genealogy in their villages, whom David and Samuel the seer did ordain in their set office.
verses.bsb: The number of those chosen to be gatekeepers at the thresholds was 212. They were registered by genealogy in their villages. David and Samuel the seer had appointed them to their positions of trust.

verses.esv: So they and their sons were in charge of the gates of the house of the LORD, that is, the house of the tent, as guards.
verses.kjv: So they and their children had the oversight of the gates of the house of the Lord, namely, the house of the tabernacle, by wards.
verses.bsb: So they and their descendants were assigned to guard the gates of the house of the LORD—the house called the Tent.

verses.esv: The gatekeepers were on the four sides, east, west, north, and south.
verses.kjv: In four quarters were the porters, toward the east, west, north, and south.
verses.bsb: The gatekeepers were stationed on the four sides: east, west, north, and south.

verses.esv: And their kinsmen who were in their villages were obligated to come in every seven days, in turn, to be with these,
verses.kjv: And their brethren, which were in their villages, were to come after seven days from time to time with them.
verses.bsb: Their relatives came from their villages at fixed times to serve with them for seven-day periods.

verses.esv: for the four chief gatekeepers, who were Levites, were entrusted to be over the chambers and the treasures of the house of God.
verses.kjv: For these Levites, the four chief porters, were in their set office, and were over the chambers and treasuries of the house of God.
verses.bsb: But the four chief gatekeepers, who were Levites, were entrusted with the rooms and the treasuries of the house of God.

verses.esv: And they lodged around the house of God, for on them lay the duty of watching, and they had charge of opening it every morning.
verses.kjv: ¶ And they lodged round about the house of God, because the charge was upon them, and the opening thereof every morning pertained to them.
verses.bsb: They would spend the night stationed around the house of God, because they were responsible for guarding it and opening it every morning.

verses.esv: Some of them had charge of the utensils of service, for they were required to count them when they were brought in and taken out.
verses.kjv: And certain of them had the charge of the ministering vessels, that they should bring them in and out by tale.
verses.bsb: Some of them were in charge of the articles used in worship, to count them whenever they were brought in or taken out.

verses.esv: Others of them were appointed over the furniture and over all the holy utensils, also over the fine flour, the wine, the oil, the incense, and the spices.
verses.kjv: Some of them also were appointed to oversee the vessels, and all the instruments of the sanctuary, and the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.
verses.bsb: Others were put in charge of the furnishings and other articles of the sanctuary, as well as the fine flour, wine, oil, frankincense, and spices.

verses.esv: Others, of the sons of the priests, prepared the mixing of the spices,
verses.kjv: And some of the sons of the priests made the ointment of the spices.
verses.bsb: And some of the sons of the priests mixed the spices.

verses.esv: and Mattithiah, one of the Levites, the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, was entrusted with making the flat cakes.
verses.kjv: And Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were made in the pans.
verses.bsb: A Levite named Mattithiah, the firstborn son of Shallum the Korahite, was entrusted with baking the bread.

verses.esv: Also some of their kinsmen of the Kohathites had charge of the showbread, to prepare it every Sabbath.
verses.kjv: And other of their brethren, of the sons of the Kohathites, were over the shewbread, to prepare it every sabbath.
verses.bsb: Some of their Kohathite brothers were responsible for preparing the rows of the showbread every Sabbath.

verses.esv: Now these, the singers, the heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, were in the chambers of the temple free from other service, for they were on duty day and night.
verses.kjv: And these are the singers, chief of the fathers of the Levites, who remaining in the chambers were free: for they were employed in that work day and night.
verses.bsb: Those who were musicians, the heads of Levite families, stayed in the temple chambers and were exempt from other duties because they were on duty day and night.

verses.esv: These were heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, according to their generations, leaders. These lived in Jerusalem.
verses.kjv: These chief fathers of the Levites were chief throughout their generations; these dwelt at Jerusalem.
verses.bsb: All these were heads of Levite families, chiefs according to their genealogies, and they lived in Jerusalem.

verses.esv: In Gibeon lived the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, and the name of his wife was Maacah,
verses.kjv: ¶ And in Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jehiel, whose wife’s name was Maachah:
verses.bsb: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon. His wife’s name was Maacah.

verses.esv: and his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab,
verses.kjv: And his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,
verses.bsb: Abdon was his firstborn son, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab,

verses.esv: Gedor, Ahio, Zechariah, and Mikloth;
verses.kjv: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.
verses.bsb: Gedor, Ahio, Zechariah, and Mikloth.

verses.esv: and Mikloth was the father of Shimeam; and these also lived opposite their kinsmen in Jerusalem, with their kinsmen.
verses.kjv: And Mikloth begat Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren at Jerusalem, over against their brethren.
verses.bsb: Mikloth was the father of Shimeam. They too lived alongside their relatives in Jerusalem.

verses.esv: Ner fathered Kish, Kish fathered Saul, Saul fathered Jonathan, Malchi-shua, Abinadab, and Eshbaal.
verses.kjv: And Ner begat Kish; and Kish begat Saul; and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.
verses.bsb: Ner was the father of Kish, Kish was the father of Saul, and Saul was the father of Jonathan, Malchishua, Abinadab, and Esh-baal.

verses.esv: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal, and Merib-baal fathered Micah.
verses.kjv: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal: and Merib-baal begat Micah.
verses.bsb: The son of Jonathan:   Merib-baal, who was the father of Micah.

verses.esv: The sons of Micah: Pithon, Melech, Tahrea, and Ahaz.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tahrea, and Ahaz.
verses.bsb: The sons of Micah:   Pithon, Melech, Tahrea, and Ahaz.

verses.esv: And Ahaz fathered Jarah, and Jarah fathered Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri. And Zimri fathered Moza.
verses.kjv: And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;
verses.bsb: Ahaz was the father of Jarah; Jarah was the father of Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri was the father of Moza.

verses.esv: Moza fathered Binea, and Rephaiah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
verses.kjv: And Moza begat Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
verses.bsb: Moza was the father of Binea. Rephaiah was his son, Elasah his son, and Azel his son.

verses.esv: Azel had six sons and these are their names: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan; these were the sons of Azel.
verses.kjv: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan: these were the sons of Azel.
verses.bsb: And Azel had six sons, and these were their names:   Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan. These were the sons of Azel.

verses.esv: Now the Philistines fought against Israel, and the men of Israel fled before the Philistines and fell slain on Mount Gilboa.
verses.kjv: NOW the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines, and fell down slain in mount Gilboa.
verses.bsb: Now the Philistines fought against Israel, and the men of Israel fled before them, and many fell slain on Mount Gilboa.

verses.esv: And the Philistines overtook Saul and his sons, and the Philistines struck down Jonathan and Abinadab and Malchi-shua, the sons of Saul.
verses.kjv: And the Philistines followed hard after Saul, and after his sons; and the Philistines slew Jonathan, and Abinadab, and Malchi-shua, the sons of Saul.
verses.bsb: The Philistines followed hard after Saul and his sons, and they killed Saul’s sons Jonathan, Abinadab, and Malchishua.

verses.esv: The battle pressed hard against Saul, and the archers found him, and he was wounded by the archers.
verses.kjv: And the battle went sore against Saul, and the archers hit him, and he was wounded of the archers.
verses.bsb: When the battle intensified against Saul, the archers overtook him and wounded him.

verses.esv: Then Saul said to his armor-bearer, “Draw your sword and thrust me through with it, lest these uncircumcised come and mistreat me.” But his armor-bearer would not, for he feared greatly. Therefore Saul took his own sword and fell upon it.
verses.kjv: Then said Saul to his armourbearer, Draw thy sword, and thrust me through therewith; lest these uncircumcised come and abuse me. But his armourbearer would not; for he was sore afraid. So Saul took a sword, and fell upon it.
verses.bsb: Then Saul said to his armor-bearer, “Draw your sword and run it through me, or these uncircumcised men will come and torture me!”  But his armor-bearer was terrified and refused to do it. So Saul took his own sword and fell on it.

verses.esv: And when his armor-bearer saw that Saul was dead, he also fell upon his sword and died.
verses.kjv: And when his armourbearer saw that Saul was dead, he fell likewise on the sword, and died.
verses.bsb: When his armor-bearer saw that Saul was dead, he too fell on his own sword and died.

verses.esv: Thus Saul died; he and his three sons and all his house died together.
verses.kjv: So Saul died, and his three sons, and all his house died together.
verses.bsb: So Saul died together with his three sons and all his house.

verses.esv: And when all the men of Israel who were in the valley saw that the army had fled and that Saul and his sons were dead, they abandoned their cities and fled, and the Philistines came and lived in them.
verses.kjv: And when all the men of Israel that were in the valley saw that they fled, and that Saul and his sons were dead, then they forsook their cities, and fled: and the Philistines came and dwelt in them.
verses.bsb: When all the Israelites in the valley saw that the army had fled and that Saul and his sons had died, they abandoned their cities and ran away. So the Philistines came and occupied their cities.

verses.esv: The next day, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, they found Saul and his sons fallen on Mount Gilboa.
verses.kjv: ¶ And it came to pass on the morrow, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, that they found Saul and his sons fallen in mount Gilboa.
verses.bsb: The next day, when the Philistines came to strip the dead, they found Saul and his sons fallen on Mount Gilboa.

verses.esv: And they stripped him and took his head and his armor, and sent messengers throughout the land of the Philistines to carry the good news to their idols and to the people.
verses.kjv: And when they had stripped him, they took his head, and his armour, and sent into the land of the Philistines round about, to carry tidings unto their idols, and to the people.
verses.bsb: They stripped Saul, cut off his head, took his armor, and sent messengers throughout the land of the Philistines to proclaim the news in the temple of their idols and among their people.

verses.esv: And they put his armor in the temple of their gods and fastened his head in the temple of Dagon.
verses.kjv: And they put his armour in the house of their gods, and fastened his head in the temple of Dagon.
verses.bsb: They put his armor in the temple of their gods and hung his head in the temple of Dagon.

verses.esv: But when all Jabesh-gilead heard all that the Philistines had done to Saul,
verses.kjv: ¶ And when all Jabesh-gilead heard all that the Philistines had done to Saul,
verses.bsb: When the people of Jabesh-gilead heard about everything the Philistines had done to Saul,

verses.esv: all the valiant men arose and took away the body of Saul and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh. And they buried their bones under the oak in Jabesh and fasted seven days.
verses.kjv: They arose, all the valiant men, and took away the body of Saul, and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh, and buried their bones under the oak in Jabesh, and fasted seven days.
verses.bsb: all their men of valor set out and retrieved the bodies of Saul and his sons and brought them to Jabesh. And they buried their bones under the oak in Jabesh and fasted seven days.

verses.esv: So Saul died for his breach of faith. He broke faith with the LORD in that he did not keep the command of the LORD, and also consulted a medium, seeking guidance.
verses.kjv: ¶ So Saul died for his transgression which he committed against the Lord, even against the word of the Lord, which he kept not, and also for asking counsel of one that had a familiar spirit, to inquire of it;
verses.bsb: So Saul died for his unfaithfulness to the LORD, because he did not keep the word of the LORD and even consulted a medium for guidance,

verses.esv: He did not seek guidance from the LORD. Therefore the LORD put him to death and turned the kingdom over to David the son of Jesse.
verses.kjv: And inquired not of the Lord: therefore he slew him, and turned the kingdom unto David the son of Jesse.
verses.bsb: and he failed to inquire of the LORD. So the LORD put him to death and turned the kingdom over to David son of Jesse.

verses.esv: Then all Israel gathered together to David at Hebron and said, “Behold, we are your bone and flesh.
verses.kjv: THEN all Israel gathered themselves to David unto Hebron, saying, Behold, we are thy bone and thy flesh.
verses.bsb: Then all Israel came together to David at Hebron and said, “Here we are, your own flesh and blood.

verses.esv: In times past, even when Saul was king, it was you who led out and brought in Israel. And the LORD your God said to you, ‘You shall be shepherd of my people Israel, and you shall be prince over my people Israel.’”
verses.kjv: And moreover in time past, even when Saul was king, thou wast he that leddest out and broughtest in Israel: and the Lord thy God said unto thee, Thou shalt feed my people Israel, and thou shalt be ruler over my people Israel.
verses.bsb: Even in times past, while Saul was king, you were the one who led Israel out and brought them back. And the LORD your God said, ‘You will shepherd My people Israel, and you will be ruler over them.’”

verses.esv: So all the elders of Israel came to the king at Hebron, and David made a covenant with them at Hebron before the LORD. And they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD by Samuel.
verses.kjv: Therefore came all the elders of Israel to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before the Lord; and they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the Lord by Samuel.
verses.bsb: So all the elders of Israel came to the king at Hebron, where David made a covenant with them before the LORD. And they anointed him king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD through Samuel.

verses.esv: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, that is, Jebus, where the Jebusites were, the inhabitants of the land.
verses.kjv: ¶ And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, which is Jebus; where the Jebusites were, the inhabitants of the land.
verses.bsb: Then David and all the Israelites marched to Jerusalem (that is, Jebus), where the Jebusites inhabited the land.

verses.esv: The inhabitants of Jebus said to David, “You will not come in here.” Nevertheless, David took the stronghold of Zion, that is, the city of David.
verses.kjv: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David, Thou shalt not come hither. Nevertheless David took the castle of Zion, which is the city of David.
verses.bsb: The people of Jebus said to David, “You will never get in here.”  Nevertheless, David captured the fortress of Zion (that is, the City of David).

verses.esv: David said, “Whoever strikes the Jebusites first shall be chief and commander.” And Joab the son of Zeruiah went up first, so he became chief.
verses.kjv: And David said, Whosoever smiteth the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain. So Joab the son of Zeruiah went first up, and was chief.
verses.bsb: Now David had said, “Whoever is the first to strike down a Jebusite will become chief commander.”  And Joab son of Zeruiah went up first, and he became the chief.

verses.esv: And David lived in the stronghold; therefore it was called the city of David.
verses.kjv: And David dwelt in the castle; therefore they called it the city of David.
verses.bsb: So David took up residence in the fortress; that is why it was called the City of David.

verses.esv: And he built the city all around from the Millo in complete circuit, and Joab repaired the rest of the city.
verses.kjv: And he built the city round about, even from Millo round about: and Joab repaired the rest of the city.
verses.bsb: He built up the city around it, from the supporting terraces to the surrounding wall, while Joab restored the rest of the city.

verses.esv: And David became greater and greater, for the LORD of hosts was with him.
verses.kjv: So David waxed greater and greater: for the Lord of hosts was with him.
verses.bsb: And David became greater and greater, for the LORD of Hosts was with him.

verses.esv: Now these are the chiefs of David's mighty men, who gave him strong support in his kingdom, together with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.
verses.kjv: ¶ These also are the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who strengthened themselves with him in his kingdom, and with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the Lord concerning Israel.
verses.bsb: Now these were the chiefs of David’s mighty men, who, together with all Israel, bolstered and strengthened his kingdom, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.

verses.esv: This is an account of David's mighty men: Jashobeam, a Hachmonite, was chief of the three. He wielded his spear against 300 whom he killed at one time.
verses.kjv: And this is the number of the mighty men whom David had; Jashobeam, an Hachmonite, the chief of the captains: he lifted up his spear against three hundred slain by him at one time.
verses.bsb: This is the list of David’s mighty men:  Jashobeam son of Hachmoni was chief of the officers; he wielded his spear against three hundred men, whom he killed at one time.

verses.esv: And next to him among the three mighty men was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite.
verses.kjv: And after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite, who was one of the three mighties.
verses.bsb: Next in command was Eleazar son of Dodo the Ahohite, one of the three mighty men.

verses.esv: He was with David at Pas-dammim when the Philistines were gathered there for battle. There was a plot of ground full of barley, and the men fled from the Philistines.
verses.kjv: He was with David at Pas-dammim, and there the Philistines were gathered together to battle, where was a parcel of ground full of barley; and the people fled from before the Philistines.
verses.bsb: He was with David at Pas-dammim when the Philistines gathered there for battle. At the place with a field full of barley, the troops fled from the Philistines.

verses.esv: But he took his stand in the midst of the plot and defended it and killed the Philistines. And the LORD saved them by a great victory.
verses.kjv: And they set themselves in the midst of that parcel, and delivered it, and slew the Philistines; and the Lord saved them by a great deliverance.
verses.bsb: But Eleazar and David stationed themselves in the middle of the field and defended it. They struck down the Philistines, and the LORD brought about a great victory.

verses.esv: Three of the thirty chief men went down to the rock to David at the cave of Adullam, when the army of Philistines was encamped in the Valley of Rephaim.
verses.kjv: ¶ Now three of the thirty captains went down to the rock to David, into the cave of Adullam; and the host of the Philistines encamped in the valley of Rephaim.
verses.bsb: Three of the thirty chief men went down to David, to the rock at the cave of Adullam, while a company of Philistines was encamped in the Valley of Rephaim.

verses.esv: David was then in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then at Bethlehem.
verses.kjv: And David was then in the hold, and the Philistines’ garrison was then at Beth-lehem.
verses.bsb: At that time David was in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was at Bethlehem.

verses.esv: And David said longingly, “Oh that someone would give me water to drink from the well of Bethlehem that is by the gate!”
verses.kjv: And David longed, and said, Oh that one would give me drink of the water of the well of Beth-lehem, that is at the gate!
verses.bsb: David longed for water and said, “Oh, that someone would get me a drink of water from the well near the gate of Bethlehem!”

verses.esv: Then the three mighty men broke through the camp of the Philistines and drew water out of the well of Bethlehem that was by the gate and took it and brought it to David. But David would not drink it. He poured it out to the LORD
verses.kjv: And the three brake through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Beth-lehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David: but David would not drink of it, but poured it out to the Lord,
verses.bsb: So the Three broke through the Philistine camp, drew water from the well at the gate of Bethlehem, and brought it back to David. But he refused to drink it; instead, he poured it out to the LORD,

verses.esv: and said, “Far be it from me before my God that I should do this. Shall I drink the lifeblood of these men? For at the risk of their lives they brought it.” Therefore he would not drink it. These things did the three mighty men.
verses.kjv: And said, My God forbid it me, that I should do this thing: shall I drink the blood of these men that have put their lives in jeopardy? for with the jeopardy of their lives they brought it. Therefore he would not drink it. These things did these three mightiest.
verses.bsb: saying, “Far be it from me, my God, to do this! How can I drink the blood of these men who risked their lives?” Because they had brought it at the risk of their lives, David refused to drink it.  Such were the exploits of the three mighty men.

verses.esv: Now Abishai, the brother of Joab, was chief of the thirty. And he wielded his spear against 300 men and killed them and won a name beside the three.
verses.kjv: ¶ And Abishai the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three: for lifting up his spear against three hundred, he slew them, and had a name among the three.
verses.bsb: Now Abishai, the brother of Joab, was chief of the Three, and he lifted his spear against three hundred men, killed them, and won a name along with the Three.

verses.esv: He was the most renowned of the thirty and became their commander, but he did not attain to the three.
verses.kjv: Of the three, he was more honourable than the two; for he was their captain: howbeit he attained not to the first three.
verses.bsb: He was doubly honored above the Three, and he became their commander, even though he was not included among the Three.

verses.esv: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was a valiant man of Kabzeel, a doer of great deeds. He struck down two heroes of Moab. He also went down and struck down a lion in a pit on a day when snow had fallen.
verses.kjv: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man of Kabzeel, who had done many acts; he slew two lionlike men of Moab: also he went down and slew a lion in a pit in a snowy day.
verses.bsb: And Benaiah son of Jehoiada was a man of valor from Kabzeel, a man of many exploits. He struck down two champions of Moab, and on a snowy day he went down into a pit and killed a lion.

verses.esv: And he struck down an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits tall. The Egyptian had in his hand a spear like a weaver's beam, but Benaiah went down to him with a staff and snatched the spear out of the Egyptian's hand and killed him with his own spear.
verses.kjv: And he slew an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits high; and in the Egyptian’s hand was a spear like a weaver’s beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian’s hand, and slew him with his own spear.
verses.bsb: He also killed an Egyptian, a huge man five cubits tall. Although the Egyptian had a spear like a weaver’s beam in his hand, Benaiah went against him with a club, snatched the spear from his hand, and killed the Egyptian with his own spear.

verses.esv: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada and won a name beside the three mighty men.
verses.kjv: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had the name among the three mighties.
verses.bsb: These were the exploits of Benaiah son of Jehoiada, who won a name alongside the three mighty men.

verses.esv: He was renowned among the thirty, but he did not attain to the three. And David set him over his bodyguard.
verses.kjv: Behold, he was honourable among the thirty, but attained not to the first three: and David set him over his guard.
verses.bsb: He was most honored among the Thirty, but he did not become one of the Three. And David appointed him over his guard.

verses.esv: The mighty men were Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,
verses.kjv: ¶ Also the valiant men of the armies were, Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Beth-lehem,
verses.bsb: Now these were the mighty men:  Asahel the brother of Joab,   Elhanan son of Dodo of Bethlehem,

verses.esv: Shammoth of Harod, Helez the Pelonite,
verses.kjv: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite,
verses.bsb: Shammoth the Harorite,   Helez the Pelonite,

verses.esv: Ira the son of Ikkesh of Tekoa, Abiezer of Anathoth,
verses.kjv: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abi-ezer the Antothite,
verses.bsb: Ira son of Ikkesh the Tekoite,   Abiezer the Anathothite,

verses.esv: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,
verses.kjv: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,
verses.bsb: Sibbecai the Hushathite,   Ilai the Ahohite,

verses.esv: Maharai of Netophah, Heled the son of Baanah of Netophah,
verses.kjv: Maharai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite,
verses.bsb: Maharai the Netophathite,   Heled son of Baanah the Netophathite,

verses.esv: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah of the people of Benjamin, Benaiah of Pirathon,
verses.kjv: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah, that pertained to the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite,
verses.bsb: Ithai son of Ribai from Gibeah of the Benjamites,   Benaiah the Pirathonite,

verses.esv: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,
verses.kjv: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,
verses.bsb: Hurai from the brooks of Gaash,   Abiel the Arbathite,

verses.esv: Azmaveth of Baharum, Eliahba the Shaalbonite,
verses.kjv: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite,
verses.bsb: Azmaveth the Baharumite,   Eliahba the Shaalbonite,

verses.esv: Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shagee the Hararite,
verses.kjv: The sons of Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shage the Hararite,
verses.bsb: the sons of Hashem the Gizonite,   Jonathan son of Shagee the Hararite,

verses.esv: Ahiam the son of Sachar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,
verses.kjv: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,
verses.bsb: Ahiam son of Sachar the Hararite,   Eliphal son of Ur,

verses.esv: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite,
verses.kjv: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite,
verses.bsb: Hepher the Mecherathite,   Ahijah the Pelonite,

verses.esv: Hezro of Carmel, Naarai the son of Ezbai,
verses.kjv: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai,
verses.bsb: Hezro the Carmelite,   Naarai son of Ezbai,

verses.esv: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Hagri,
verses.kjv: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Haggeri,
verses.bsb: Joel the brother of Nathan,   Mibhar son of Hagri,

verses.esv: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai of Beeroth, the armor-bearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,
verses.kjv: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Berothite, the armourbearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,
verses.bsb: Zelek the Ammonite,   Naharai the Beerothite, the armor-bearer of Joab son of Zeruiah,

verses.esv: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,
verses.kjv: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,
verses.bsb: Ira the Ithrite,   Gareb the Ithrite,

verses.esv: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai,
verses.kjv: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai,
verses.bsb: Uriah the Hittite,   Zabad son of Ahlai,

verses.esv: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a leader of the Reubenites, and thirty with him,
verses.kjv: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a captain of the Reubenites, and thirty with him,
verses.bsb: Adina son of Shiza the Reubenite, chief of the Reubenites, and the thirty with him,

verses.esv: Hanan the son of Maacah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite,
verses.kjv: Hanan the son of Maachah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite,
verses.bsb: Hanan son of Maacah,   Joshaphat the Mithnite,

verses.esv: Uzzia the Ashterathite, Shama and Jeiel the sons of Hotham the Aroerite,
verses.kjv: Uzzia the Ashterathite, Shama and Jehiel the sons of Hothan the Aroerite,
verses.bsb: Uzzia the Ashterathite,   Shama and Jeiel the sons of Hotham the Aroerite,

verses.esv: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,
verses.kjv: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,
verses.bsb: Jediael son of Shimri and his brother Joha the Tizite,

verses.esv: Eliel the Mahavite, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Ithmah the Moabite,
verses.kjv: Eliel the Mahavite, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Ithmah the Moabite,
verses.bsb: Eliel the Mahavite,   Jeribai and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam,   Ithmah the Moabite,

verses.esv: Eliel, and Obed, and Jaasiel the Mezobaite.
verses.kjv: Eliel, and Obed, and Jasiel the Mesobaite.
verses.bsb: Eliel, Obed, and Jaasiel the Mezobaite.

verses.esv: Now these are the men who came to David at Ziklag, while he could not move about freely because of Saul the son of Kish. And they were among the mighty men who helped him in war.
verses.kjv: NOW these are they that came to David to Ziklag, while he yet kept himself close because of Saul the son of Kish: and they were among the mighty men, helpers of the war.
verses.bsb: Now these were the men who came to David at Ziklag, while he was still banished from the presence of Saul son of Kish (they were among the mighty men who helped him in battle;

verses.esv: They were bowmen and could shoot arrows and sling stones with either the right or the left hand; they were Benjaminites, Saul's kinsmen.
verses.kjv: They were armed with bows, and could use both the right hand and the left in hurling stones and shooting arrows out of a bow, even of Saul’s brethren of Benjamin.
verses.bsb: they were archers using both the right and left hands to sling stones and shoot arrows; and they were Saul’s kinsmen from Benjamin):

verses.esv: The chief was Ahiezer, then Joash, both sons of Shemaah of Gibeah; also Jeziel and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; Beracah, Jehu of Anathoth,
verses.kjv: The chief was Ahiezer, then Joash, the sons of Shemaah the Gibeathite; and Jeziel, and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; and Berachah, and Jehu the Antothite,
verses.bsb: Ahiezer their chief and Joash, who were the sons of Shemaah the Gibeathite;   Jeziel and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth;   Beracah;   Jehu the Anathothite;

verses.esv: Ishmaiah of Gibeon, a mighty man among the thirty and a leader over the thirty; Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan, Jozabad of Gederah,
verses.kjv: And Ismaiah the Gibeonite, a mighty man among the thirty, and over the thirty; and Jeremiah, and Jahaziel, and Johanan, and Josabad the Gederathite,
verses.bsb: Ishmaiah the Gibeonite, a mighty man among the Thirty and a leader over the Thirty;   Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan, and Jozabad the Gederathite;

verses.esv: Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah, Shephatiah the Haruphite;
verses.kjv: Eluzai, and Jerimoth, and Bealiah, and Shemariah, and Shephatiah the Haruphite,
verses.bsb: Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah, and Shephatiah the Haruphite;

verses.esv: Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer, and Jashobeam, the Korahites;
verses.kjv: Elkanah, and Jesiah, and Azareel, and Joezer, and Jashobeam, the Korhites,
verses.bsb: Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer, and Jashobeam, who were Korahites;

verses.esv: And Joelah and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
verses.kjv: And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
verses.bsb: and Joelah and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham from Gedor.

verses.esv: From the Gadites there went over to David at the stronghold in the wilderness mighty and experienced warriors, expert with shield and spear, whose faces were like the faces of lions and who were swift as gazelles upon the mountains:
verses.kjv: And of the Gadites there separated themselves unto David into the hold to the wilderness men of might, and men of war fit for the battle, that could handle shield and buckler, whose faces were like the faces of lions, and were as swift as the roes upon the mountains;
verses.bsb: Some Gadites defected to David at his stronghold in the desert. They were mighty men of valor, trained for battle, experts with the shield and spear, whose faces were like the faces of lions and who were as swift as gazelles on the mountains:

verses.esv: Ezer the chief, Obadiah second, Eliab third,
verses.kjv: Ezer the first, Obadiah the second, Eliab the third,
verses.bsb: Ezer the chief, Obadiah the second in command, Eliab the third,

verses.esv: Mishmannah fourth, Jeremiah fifth,
verses.kjv: Mishmannah the fourth, Jeremiah the fifth,
verses.bsb: Mishmannah the fourth, Jeremiah the fifth,

verses.esv: Attai sixth, Eliel seventh,
verses.kjv: Attai the sixth, Eliel the seventh,
verses.bsb: Attai the sixth, Eliel the seventh,

verses.esv: Johanan eighth, Elzabad ninth,
verses.kjv: Johanan the eighth, Elzabad the ninth,
verses.bsb: Johanan the eighth, Elzabad the ninth,

verses.esv: Jeremiah tenth, Machbannai eleventh.
verses.kjv: Jeremiah the tenth, Machbanai the eleventh.
verses.bsb: Jeremiah the tenth, and Machbanai the eleventh.

verses.esv: These Gadites were officers of the army; the least was a match for a hundred men and the greatest for a thousand.
verses.kjv: These were of the sons of Gad, captains of the host: one of the least was over an hundred, and the greatest over a thousand.
verses.bsb: These Gadites were army commanders, the least of whom was a match for a hundred, and the greatest for a thousand.

verses.esv: These are the men who crossed the Jordan in the first month, when it was overflowing all its banks, and put to flight all those in the valleys, to the east and to the west.
verses.kjv: These are they that went over Jordan in the first month, when it had overflown all his banks; and they put to flight all them of the valleys, both toward the east, and toward the west.
verses.bsb: These are the ones who crossed the Jordan in the first month when it was overflowing all its banks, and they put to flight all those in the valleys, both to the east and to the west.

verses.esv: And some of the men of Benjamin and Judah came to the stronghold to David.
verses.kjv: And there came of the children of Benjamin and Judah to the hold unto David.
verses.bsb: Other Benjamites and some men from Judah also came to David in his stronghold.

verses.esv: David went out to meet them and said to them, “If you have come to me in friendship to help me, my heart will be joined to you; but if to betray me to my adversaries, although there is no wrong in my hands, then may the God of our fathers see and rebuke you.”
verses.kjv: And David went out to meet them, and answered and said unto them, If ye be come peaceably unto me to help me, mine heart shall be knit unto you: but if ye be come to betray me to mine enemies, seeing there is no wrong in mine hands, the God of our fathers look thereon, and rebuke it.
verses.bsb: And David went out to meet them, saying, “If you have come to me in peace to help me, my heart will be united with you; but if you have come to betray me to my enemies when my hands are free of violence, may the God of our fathers see it and judge you.”

verses.esv: Then the Spirit clothed Amasai, chief of the thirty, and he said, “We are yours, O David, and with you, O son of Jesse! Peace, peace to you, and peace to your helpers! For your God helps you.” Then David received them and made them officers of his troops.
verses.kjv: Then the spirit came upon Amasai, who was chief of the captains, and he said, Thine are we, David, and on thy side, thou son of Jesse: peace, peace be unto thee, and peace be to thine helpers; for thy God helpeth thee. Then David received them, and made them captains of the band.
verses.bsb: Then the Spirit came upon Amasai, the chief of the Thirty, and he said:  “We are yours, O David! We are with you, O son of Jesse! Peace, peace to you, and peace to your helpers, for your God helps you.”   So David received them and made them leaders of his troops.

verses.esv: Some of the men of Manasseh deserted to David when he came with the Philistines for the battle against Saul. (Yet he did not help them, for the rulers of the Philistines took counsel and sent him away, saying, “At peril to our heads he will desert to his master Saul.”)
verses.kjv: And there fell some of Manasseh to David, when he came with the Philistines against Saul to battle: but they helped them not: for the lords of the Philistines upon advisement sent him away, saying, He will fall to his master Saul to the jeopardy of our heads.
verses.bsb: Some from Manasseh defected to David when he went with the Philistines to fight against Saul. (They did not help the Philistines because the Philistine rulers consulted and sent David away, saying, “It will cost us our heads if he defects to his master Saul.”)

verses.esv: As he went to Ziklag, these men of Manasseh deserted to him: Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Michael, Jozabad, Elihu, and Zillethai, chiefs of thousands in Manasseh.
verses.kjv: As he went to Ziklag, there fell to him of Manasseh, Adnah, and Jozabad, and Jediael, and Michael, and Jozabad, and Elihu, and Zilthai, captains of the thousands that were of Manasseh.
verses.bsb: When David went to Ziklag, these men of Manasseh defected to him:  Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Michael, Jozabad, Elihu, and Zillethai, chiefs of thousands in Manasseh.

verses.esv: They helped David against the band of raiders, for they were all mighty men of valor and were commanders in the army.
verses.kjv: And they helped David against the band of the rovers: for they were all mighty men of valour, and were captains in the host.
verses.bsb: They helped David against the raiders, for they were all mighty men of valor and commanders in the army.

verses.esv: For from day to day men came to David to help him, until there was a great army, like an army of God.
verses.kjv: For at that time day by day there came to David to help him, until it was a great host, like the host of God.
verses.bsb: For at that time men came to David day after day to help him, until he had a great army, like the army of God.

verses.esv: These are the numbers of the divisions of the armed troops who came to David in Hebron to turn the kingdom of Saul over to him, according to the word of the LORD.
verses.kjv: ¶ And these are the numbers of the bands that were ready armed to the war, and came to David to Hebron, to turn the kingdom of Saul to him, according to the word of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Now these are the numbers of men armed for battle who came to David at Hebron to turn Saul’s kingdom over to him, in accordance with the word of the LORD:

verses.esv: The men of Judah bearing shield and spear were 6,800 armed troops.
verses.kjv: The children of Judah that bare shield and spear were six thousand and eight hundred, ready armed to the war.
verses.bsb: From Judah: 6,800 armed troops bearing shields and spears.

verses.esv: Of the Simeonites, mighty men of valor for war, 7,100.
verses.kjv: Of the children of Simeon, mighty men of valour for the war, seven thousand and one hundred.
verses.bsb: From Simeon: 7,100 mighty men of valor, ready for battle.

verses.esv: Of the Levites 4,600.
verses.kjv: Of the children of Levi four thousand and six hundred.
verses.bsb: From Levi: 4,600,

verses.esv: The prince Jehoiada, of the house of Aaron, and with him 3,700.
verses.kjv: And Jehoiada was the leader of the Aaronites, and with him were three thousand and seven hundred;
verses.bsb: including Jehoiada, leader of the house of Aaron, with 3,700 men,
